# HowLongDrive.uk

> UK driving times, distances, and route information between cities.

HowLongDrive.uk provides accurate driving time and distance data for road trips between cities across the United Kingdom.

## Content

- ~7,692 route pages with driving times, distances, fuel costs, and driving tips
- ~7,693 EV route pages with charging stop information for electric vehicles
- ~213 city pages listing all available routes from each city
- Road trip guides for popular scenic and cross-country drives

## URL Patterns

- Homepage: https://howlongdrive.uk/
- Route page: https://howlongdrive.uk/route/{city-a}-to-{city-b}/
- EV route page: https://howlongdrive.uk/ev/{city-a}-to-{city-b}/
- City page: https://howlongdrive.uk/cities/{city-slug}/
- Guides: https://howlongdrive.uk/guides/

## Each Route Page Includes

- Estimated driving time
- Distance in miles
- Fuel cost estimate (petrol and diesel)
- Interactive route map
- Driving tips for the journey
- Frequently asked questions
- Links to nearby routes

## Each EV Route Page Includes

- Estimated driving time
- Distance in miles
- Electricity cost estimate
- Recommended charging stops
- Battery level guidance
- Charging station details

## Each City Page Includes

- List of all routes from that city
- Sorted by distance
- Quick links to route and EV route pages
